sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Float64, vector Array(Float64)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, cosh(value + tupleElement(vector, 1)) AS hyper_cosh FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, cosh(value) AS hyper_cosh FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value >= 0);
SELECT id, cosh(value) AS hyper_cosh FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING hyper_cosh > 1;
SELECT id, cosh(value + tupleElement(vector, 2)) AS hyper_cosh FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value <= 5.0);
SELECT id, cosh(value) AS hyper_cosh, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY value) AS cnt FROM test_table ORDER BY hyper_cosh DESC;
SELECT id, cosh(value + 10.0) AS result FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE vector[1] IS NOT NULL) WHERE result < 5;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT id, cosh(value) AS hyper_cosh, vector FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND id < 3;
SELECT tupleElement((SELECT groupArray(id) FROM temp_table WHERE vector[1] IS NOT NULL), 1) AS first_id;
SELECT cosh(NULLCAST(value AS Float64)) AS hyper_cosh FROM test_table;
SELECT cosh(COALESCE(value, 0) + 8) AS hyper_cosh FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING hyper_cosh > 1;
SELECT id, cosh(value + tupleElement(vector, 1)) AS hyper_cosh FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM temp_table WHERE vector[1] IS NOT NULL) HAVING hyper_cosh < 20;
